jobs.name: Pill reminder (first detection, expires 7d)
jobs.prompt:
Run silently unless there is something to do.

1. Compute today’s marker path: /tmp/pill-reminder-<YYYY-MM-DD>.sent
2. If /tmp/pill-reminder-sent exists, that means today’s reminder already fired. Exit silently.
3. Read /tmp/pill-reminder-start to learn your creation date. If more than 7 days have passed, call cronjob(action='remove', job_id='627331267460'), then exit.
4. Use homeassistant to get the state of media_player.android_tv_192_168_1_62.
5. If state is 'playing' or 'on', send a short, friendly pill reminder to telegram and write /tmp/pill-reminder-sent.
6. Otherwise exit silently.
